# Banksi — Crypto Payment Module

> Add USDT/USDC payments to any app. Built for vibe coders.

## Docs

- [Full SDK Documentation](https://banksi.vercel.app/api/docs): Complete integration guide with code examples for Next.js, Express, and React
- [API Reference](https://banksi.vercel.app/docs): Interactive documentation page

## Quick Integration

```bash
npm install banksi
```

```typescript
// Next.js paywall (1 line)
import { createBanksiPaywall } from 'banksi/next';
const paywall = createBanksiPaywall({ amount: 0.10 });

// React pay button
import { BanksiPayButton } from 'banksi/react';
<BanksiPayButton amount={4.50} onPaymentConfirmed={(id) => {}} />
```

Environment: `BANKSI_API_KEY=bks_xxx` (get from https://banksi.vercel.app/register)

## Links

- Homepage: https://banksi.vercel.app
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/banksi
- Docs (plain text): https://banksi.vercel.app/api/docs
- Register: https://banksi.vercel.app/register
- Dashboard: https://banksi.vercel.app/merchant
- Demo: https://banksi.vercel.app/examples/cafe
